title: AgentTaskReceipt
description: Immutable receipt issued for every agent task payment in AGENTROPOLIS-PAYRAIL.

taskId.description: The task this receipt is for

agentId.description: The agent that performed the task

districtId.description: The district billed for this task

description.description: Human-readable description of the task performed

amountUsdc.description: USDC amount charged for this task

status.description: Final status of the payment associated with this receipt

dryRun.description: True if this receipt was generated in dry-run mode (no real funds moved)

settlementTxHash.description: On-chain transaction hash after settlement. Null for dry-run or pending. TODO: populated by x402-adapter (Phase 2)

policyId.description: The wallet-guard policy that approved this payment

issuedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this receipt was created

settledAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when settlement was confirmed on-chain. Null until settled.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata attached by the agent or recipe
